reviews.author: Gaurav Lohiya 515 / 20
reviews.review_body: This is a good place roads are little busy

reviews.author: R K
reviews.review_body: Well I was there for a few hours only so I don't know about the teachers or the studies. It was my exam centre for A State PCS exam. :) The infrastructure was good, classrooms and washrooms were clean as well.  It''s easy to reach there you can get a shared auto or an e-rickshaw from the metro station tughlakabad Or badarpur. I found it difficult to come back from school to the metro station. Barely I could manage to get a rickshaw at evening hours there.

reviews.author: Shalabh Agrawal
reviews.review_body: Worst school, staff and management are ridiculous, they have no shame at all and don't know how to talk with parents or children. misbehaving with parents. when I ask school leaving certificate for my son (he was in 8th standard) they ask money 800/-  for tc. please don't send your child in such a bad mannered school.

reviews.author: Sudhaa Dixit
reviews.review_body: Pathetic school in this area. No, camera's, no water, no activity, no appreciation, pathetic condition of toilets and classroom, and that's a international school and agar aapne galti se bhe complaint kar de to aapko he blame kaege, Roz notebook and pencil box and xyz Jo bhe baccho ke cheeze hai chori ho jate hai and camera installation ke liye bolo to wo nahe ho pata baccho ko Ghar se lock laane ko kaha jaata hai half yearly ke pehle copy or chooi ho jaate hai , complaint Karo to principal aapko bacche ko le ja sakte ho suggest karte hai poocha jaate hai ke aap kaha se belong karte ho admission ke time nahe poochte hai bas inke drawbacks bateao tab poochte hai . all r  so diplomatic and good  in manipulation principal and the lady Deepika sitting at the reception and everyone in this school.

reviews.author: Sachin Kumar
reviews.review_body: Very bad experience in this school because they take too much fees and not give any facilities and addmission charges are too much high don't take addmission in this school they are not worth it and sports facilities is also poor or bad plz don't take addmission

reviews.author: Dhruv Raj
reviews.review_body: Worst school, they will beat your child mercilessly and have no shame at all and dont know how to talk to parents or chidren at all as the staff is rude and pathetic

reviews.author: Nilima Pal
reviews.review_body: Friendly environment  as I worked there 9 yrs ago, co staff and teachers are also helpful.
